title: UAP News - 3 new reports
message:
1. UFO insider claims US has bodies of 4 different alien species from downed spacecraft in government custody
2. Secret UFO Recovery Program Hid ‘Multiple Alien Species,’ Claims Hal Puthoff | WATCH
3. Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
